arts.sum: Sky Germany and Bild report that Borussia Dortmund have recalled midfielder Salih Özcan from his loan at Wolfsburg following a ligament injury to Felix Nmecha. Özcan had been on loan at Wolfsburg,…

arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten reports that Borussia Dortmund midfielder Felix Nmecha will miss several weeks with a ligament injury picked up at the weekend. Nmecha went off in the first half in Dortmund’s…

arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten reports that Borussia Dortmund are set to fire Sven Mislintat due to the unrest he has caused in the team’s management since his return. Since returning to the club…
